description.plain: About This EVERY PLATE IS UNIQUE: This dinerware set are fired with two different glazes, so the surface develops a beautiful color and makes your food look even more delicious.Since our glaze is all-natural, the surface of plates would change color on different lighting. The color may be a tad different from what you see in the images,but very item is betiful.Our glaze is also extra strong to prevent scratches from your knives and forks. LEAD FREE EAT SAFTY：Unlike other ceramic companies, our glazes are lead free.The Plates and bowls set are made of Biodegradable material, and the glaze is all-natural. After 2340℉ high temperature firing for 13 hours, the plates are lead-free, cadmium free and non-toxic, meaning you will never have to worry about any health problem. GOOD SHAPE AND MULTI-PURPOSE:: the flat dinner plates set creates a Rustic and minimalist table setting.The shape is great as it makes. they are easier to handle and hold and they stack really well without taking up much space,stack and nestle nicely in your cupboard or shelves.Our Dinnerware set is microwave,dishwasher and freezer safe,Perfect for every day use, indoors or out; ideal for any kitchen let your food look even more delicious, and make you happy every day. WHAT'S IN THE BOX: 18 piece set includes 6 piece 10.5 Inch dinner plates,6 piece 8.5 inch appetizer/snack/salad plates,6 piece 24 oz soup/cereal bowls. PERFECT PACKAGING: The products are protected by multiple layers of packaging, and our packaging passes the 90 cm drop test to ensure that the product can be safely and completely delivered to your home.
